content.en:
The copy talent instantly enveloped the place where the innate eternal life was, probed the opponent's talent, and the copy talent memorized the opponent's body.

In the future, Ye Tian could completely replicate this innate eternal life body.

Other than that.

The talent of this innate eternal life is indeed very awesome, and the whole body is full of eternal ancestral endowments, which shows how awesome its talent is, and it is worthy of being an innate eternal life.

Eternal Ancestral Strength!

Speed Eternal Ancestor!

Defend against the Eternal Ancestors!

......

Ye Tian has these Eternal Ancestral Endowments, so he doesn't care much about them, but there is one Eternal Ancestral Endowment that Ye Tian does not have, and that is the Immortal Eternal Ancestral Endowment.

This means that this innate eternal life has an immortal ability, and once it grows, it is very difficult to kill.

Of course, it has only just been born now, and although it is comparable to the Supreme, its strength is very weak, and it can still be easily killed.

Abrupt.

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor locked Ye Tian.

"Dare to get closer, look for death!"

The Heavenly Ruins Ancestor has made a move.

He stabbed with a spear in his hand, but he didn't do it with all his might.

In his opinion, Ye Tian was just a triple supreme, and it was not worth his full effort.

Therefore, the power of his blow was only in the Sevenfold Realm.

However, this blow was resisted by Ye Tian's fingers, and it did not hurt Ye Tian at all.

The expression of the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor changed, and without saying a word, he directly went all out, he didn't want Ye Tian to ruin this operation.

Bang!!!

The Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor struck with all his might, and the endless time and space shattered, and the terrifying blow seemed to annihilate this endless territory.

The distance was nothing to the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor Tribulation, and unless Ye Tian escaped from the range of his perception, he would not be able to avoid this blow.

This is the attack power that belongs to the Nine Realms.

Ye Tian didn't leave his hand, and directly urged the power of that Eternal Realm finger to exert the combat power of the Nine Folds Supreme.

Suddenly, a huge finger appeared in the void, as if above all the rules, and directly descended in front of the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor, and pressed it down.

Boom!!!

The collision between Ye Tian and the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor caused a tide in time and space, and even the Wind Ancient River began to shake, and countless areas collapsed.

Click!!!

A large number of cracks appeared in Ye Tian's body, which was an injury caused by the powerful fingers of the Eternal Realm Urged by Power, but he just looked a little hideous, but the injury was actually not very serious.

After all, his current Endless Eternal Body had reached the Dacheng realm, and his cultivation had also reached the Triple Supreme realm, so the price he paid for urging the Eternal Realm Powerful Finger would be lighter.

But he knew very well that even so, he was still not the opponent of the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor.

Even if the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor has cut off the cultivation, with the addition of various treasures, the combat power that he actually exerts can still reach the Ninefold Realm.

Moreover, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor was able to exert the combat power of the Nine Realms more than once, but every time.

"Let's go!"

Ye Tian didn't want to continue fighting, he had already achieved his goal, and there was no need to continue to take risks.

Wow!

Ye Tian quickly escaped, and the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor struck again, but Ye Tian's second Nine Folds Supreme Attack was resisted, and he quickly left here.

If the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor wanted to hunt down Ye Tian, Ye Tian was afraid that he would not be able to escape.

However, the Heavenly Ruins Ancestor did not dare to take the risk.

His purpose now was to bring the Innate Eternal Life back to the Eternal Tribulation Domain, not to kill Ye Tian.

He could see that Ye Tian had a powerful finger of the Eternal Realm, and he didn't know how to fuse that finger, and he could exert the power of the finger, so that he could burst out the combat power of the Nine Realms.

However, the fingers of the Eternal Realm power were much less valuable than the innate eternal life.

Therefore, he will not risk it for the sake of the Eternal Realm Finger.

Immediately.

He grasped the innate eternal life that had just been born, and was about to leave the Wind Ancient River.

However, at this moment, the mutation protruded.

A white palm came across time and space, and even the rules of the Wind Ancient River could hardly restrict the arrival of this hand.

I saw that the rules of the Wind Ancient River restricting the realm above the Sixfold Supreme were shattered inch by inch, the entire chain of rules of the Wind Ancient River was shattered, and the rules of the entire Void were chaotic, and none of them could prevent this hand from coming.

And when this hand came, the Eternal Tribulation Clan and the Supreme Beings of the Wind Ancient River were all frozen, and it was difficult to move at all.

Even the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor had a hard time moving, and in front of this hand, he seemed to be like an ant.

"Eternal !!!"

The ancestors of the Heavenly Ruins were unwilling.

It's just one step away!

If it weren't for Ye Tian blocking him at that moment, he might have left with his innate eternal life.

Of course, perhaps the eternal realm has been hidden in the shadows.

In that case, he wouldn't take this innate eternal life with him no matter what.

"Why? Why are you here to rob the innate eternal life?"

The Heavenly Ruins Ancestor asked.

"Noise!"

With a crisp woman's voice, a finger descended, and with just one finger, the Heavenly Ruins Tribulation Ancestor was seriously injured and dying.

In the next moment, the innate eternal life vanished.

I have to say that the losses of the Eternal Tribulation Clan are too heavy.

Not only did he lose a large number of clansmen, but he also killed himself as an ancestor of the Heavenly Ruins, just for the sake of innate eternal life, but he didn't expect to be snatched away by a mysterious Eternal Realm at a critical moment.

It can be said that the Eternal Tribulation has suffered a miserable loss.

But the real winner, except for that Eternal Realm, belongs to Ye Tian.

At this time.

Ye Tian left the Wind Ancient River and returned to the Void Source Palace.

Subsequently, he opened the Void Source Palace's heavy formation prohibition, which lifted the copy body, and then copied the body of the innate eternal life.

He didn't want to copy an innate eternal life by himself, only to be snatched away by an Eternal Realm powerhouse, it would be too embarrassing.

In the Void Source Hall, a huge one-horned creature emerged, which was the innate eternal life copy body condensed by Ye Tian.

Ye Tian existed with the body of an innate eternal life, and immediately felt the extraordinaryness of this body.

Not to mention those eternal ancestral endowments, just the countless innate eternal rules contained in his body made Ye Tian comprehend the innate eternal rules all the time, and his progress in the eternal rules was improving at an incredible speed.

Moreover, the body structure of the innate eternal life is completely worthy of Ye Tian's research, this is simply the innate eternal body!

"In the next few years, let's carefully study and comprehend this innate eternal life!"

Ye Tian muttered.
